'''nadogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enacter|enacter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enacter|enacter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nadogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædegeth|nædegeth]] || [[word:nædegej|nædegej]] || [[word:nædegesh|nædegesh]] || [[word:nædege|nædege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadodogoth|nadodogoth]] || [[word:nadodogoj|nadodogoj]] || [[word:nadodogosh|nadodogosh]] || [[word:nadodogo|nadodogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadogoth|nadogoth]] || [[word:nadogoj|nadogoj]] || [[word:nadogosh|nadogosh]] || [[word:nadogo|nadogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadofgoth|nadofgoth]] || [[word:nadofgoj|nadofgoj]] || [[word:nadofgosh|nadofgosh]] || [[word:nadofgof|nadofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadogotho|nadogotho]] || [[word:nadogojo|nadogojo]] || [[word:nadogosho|nadogosho]] || [[word:nadogoko|nadogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadogoth|nadogoth]] || [[word:nadogoj|nadogoj]] || [[word:nadogosh|nadogosh]] || [[word:nadogo|nadogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadogothol|nadogothol]] || [[word:nadogojol|nadogojol]] || [[word:nadogoshol|nadogoshol]] || [[word:nadogokol|nadogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadogothotho|nadogothotho]] || [[word:nadogojojo|nadogojojo]] || [[word:nadogoshosho|nadogoshosho]] || [[word:nadogoko|nadogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadogothon|nadogothon]] || [[word:nadogojon|nadogojon]] || [[word:nadogoshon|nadogoshon]] || [[word:nadogokon|nadogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadogothoro|nadogothoro]] || [[word:nadogojoro|nadogojoro]] || [[word:nadogoshoro|nadogoshoro]] || [[word:nadogokoro|nadogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
